## Summary\n- lower context-fit Jaccard floor from 0.05 to 0.03 to reduce false negatives on valid prose\n- extend unsupported-fact detection to include written numbers (e.g. forty-seven, one hundred)\n- remove generic fallback literary phrasing in opportunity ledger fallback builders in favor of anchor-derived prose\n- prevent stale preflight reason carryover from re-blocking regenerated opportunities\n- preserve blocked candidate text for admin quarantine instead of wiping A/B/C in preflight block path\n- fix hydration status suffix classification so partial hydration stays partial\n\n## Validation\n- npx jest __tests__/lib/revision/opportunityLedger.test.ts __tests__/lib/revision/candidateQuality.test.ts --runInBand --no-coverage\n- npx tsc --noEmit\n
